hooks.command: STATUS_FILE="$PWD/.claude/workflow/STATUS.md"; if [ -f "$STATUS_FILE" ]; then PHASE=$(grep '^\*\*Phase\*\*:' "$STATUS_FILE" | head -1 | sed 's/\*\*Phase\*\*: //'); EPIC=$(grep '^\*\*Current Epic\*\*:' "$STATUS_FILE" | head -1 | sed 's/\*\*Current Epic\*\*: //'); echo "=== BudFin Workflow ==="; echo "Phase: $PHASE"; echo "Epic: $EPIC"; echo "Run /workflow:status for full checklist."; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" =~ (^|/)secrets(/|$) ]] || [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" =~ (^|/)\.env ]]; then echo 'ERROR: Writing to secrets/ or .env files is blocked by hook.'; exit 2; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs)$ ]] && [[ ! "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(test|spec)\. ]]; then STATUS_FILE="$PWD/.claude/workflow/STATUS.md"; if [ -f "$STATUS_FILE" ]; then PHASE_LINE=$(grep '^\*\*Phase\*\*:' "$STATUS_FILE" | head -1); PHASE_NUM=$(echo "$PHASE_LINE" | grep -o '[0-9]' | head -1); if [ -n "$PHASE_NUM" ] && [ "$PHASE_NUM" -lt 5 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo "WORKFLOW WARNING: Writing implementation code but current phase is $PHASE_NUM ($PHASE_LINE). Phase 5 (TDD RED) should be active before writing any code. Check /workflow:status."; fi; fi; fi
